channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Little Snitch’s software counter surveillance jumps from Mac to Linux
item.description: The popular macOS app Little Snitch brought its network-monitoring tools over to Linux this week. In a blog post announcing the launch, one of the developers at Objective Development shared some early results from using the app on Linux: "On Ubuntu, I found 9 system processes making internet connections over the course of one week. […]

item.title: French government says au revoir Windows, bienvenue Linux
item.description: America's Big Tech companies may soon learn that saddling up with Donald Trump doesn't tend to work out in the end. As the president sows chaos and distrust around the globe while taking aim at EU tech regulations, Europe is looking for ways to adopt its own alternatives. The latest example is France, which said it's dropping Microsoft Windows in favor of Linux.On Wednesday, France said (via TechCrunch) it plans to move its workstations from Windows to the open-source Linux. It's part of a broader movement across Europe toward digital sovereignty, aimed at reducing reliance on foreign tech — e...

item.title: Google adds E2E to Gmail for iOS and Android enterprise users
item.description: Google has announced that end-to-end encryption (E2EE) for Gmail on Android and iOS is now rolling out for its enterprise users. Emails that require E2EE in Workspace can be composed and read within the Gmail app, so eligible users won’t need additional apps or portals. The new feature expands Google’s client-side encryption (CSE) offering, a little more than a year after E2EE was introduced to Gmail on the web. According to a Google blog post, any encrypted message sent to a recipient who uses the Gmail app will appear in their inbox as any email thread would. If they don’t have the app, they...

item.title: Test Samsung Galaxy A57 : un design affiné et c’est à peu près tout
item.description: Le nouveau smartphone "haut de gamme du milieu de gamme" de Samsung est plus fin, plus léger et plus performant des Galaxy A. Pour le reste (écran, photo et batterie) le constructeur se contente de recycler les composants du Galaxy A56 !

item.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
item.description: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

item.title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
item.description: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.

item.title: Free contre-attaque l’UFC-Que choisir sur le forfait Free Max
item.description: Free Mobile répond à l'UFC-Que choisir sur l'intérêt de son nouveau forfait Free Max.

item.title: Suspect Arrested For Allegedly Throwing Molotov Cocktail at Sam Altman's Home
item.description: An attacker allegedly threw a molotov cocktail at the OpenAI CEO's residence before making threats outside of the startup's headquarters.

item.title: ‘Exit 8’ and liminal space horror: A low-budget movie trend shaped by Gen Z’s most traumatic formative years
item.description: Lockdowns and the decline of shared physical spaces have produced a generation of young moviegoers with a taste for the deserted. The scariest movie you see this year might be set in a liminal space.

item.title: Amazon retire près de 20 % sur ce SSD NMVe de 4 To, une belle affaire face à la flambée des prix
item.description: Alors que les prix du stockage continuent de grimper, les bonnes affaires se font de plus en plus rares. Pourtant, certaines offres valent le détour. C’est le cas de ce SSD NVMe Lexar NQ790 de 4 To, proposé actuellement à 379 euros au lieu de 459 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Scientists Used Medieval Poems and Trees to Uncover a 13th-Century Solar Surge
item.description: Older civilizations were as mesmerized as we were when beautiful northern lights lit up the skies.

item.title: Soaring gas prices from Iran war fuels the biggest monthly inflation surge in four years
item.description: It’s the first read on inflation to capture the effects of the Iran war. The largest monthly jump in gas prices in six decades caused a sharp spike in inflation in March, creating major challenges for the inflation-fighters at the Federal Reserve and heightening the political hurdles for the White House.

item.title: "Uncanny Valley": OpenAI and Musk Fight Again; DOJ Mishandles Voter Data; Artemis II Comes Home
item.description: In this episode, the hosts discuss the fight between OpenAI and Elon Musk, the misuse of voter data, and Artemis II’s moonshot.

item.title: This Clever Bike Bell Can Even Be Heard by People Wearing Noise-Canceling Headphones
item.description: Škoda's DuoBell is designed to avoid collisions between cyclists and pedestrians preoccupied by their podcasts.

item.title: ‘It’s a potential national security threat’: Proton study finds over 3,500 US legislators’ official emails leaked and exposed on the dark web
item.description: The emails and plaintext passwords of thousands of government representatives have been found online.

item.title: Revolut débarque bientôt dans les gares et aéroports en France : voici de nouveaux distributeurs qui vont faciliter vous la vie
item.description: Il y a trois ans, la banque en ligne Revolut installait des distributeurs de cartes bancaires dans plusieurs aéroports européens. À Rome, Bruxelles, Porto et Helsinki, les voyageurs peuvent retirer une carte neuve avant leur décollage. Selon nos informations, ces distributeurs pourraient bientôt arriver dans les aéroports et gares en France.

item.title: « Trop peu d’expérience » : le patron de Ford s’est moqué des pick-ups chinois mais la réponse de BYD est cinglante
item.description: BYD vient de présenter le Shark 6 Performance avec un moteur 2,0 litres turbo et une capacité de remorquage de 3 500 kg, soit exactement celle du Ford Ranger australien. Une réponse directe aux critiques du patron de Ford.

item.title: Google has reportedly started to add Polymarket data to News results
item.description: Google News has begun showing Polymarket bets and odds alongside actual stories, according to a report by Futurism. These look to appear as large blocks that include links to numerous ways for people to lose their money. Bets tend to appear in the "For you" section of Google News, which is supposed to be tailored to a person's particular interests. Futurism notes that the platform actually placed a Polymarket bet as the top news result when inquiring about the price of Bitcoin. The publication saw links to the prediction market all over Google News, including in searches. It popped up in queri...

item.title: Meilleurs écouteurs ouverts en 2026 : le comparatif des open ear
item.description: Tout le monde n'aime pas les écouteurs intra-auriculaires. Que cela soit pour une question de confort ou encore pour la pratique du sport, voici les meilleurs modèles d'écouteurs ouverts que l'on vous conseille.

item.title: YouTube Premium Jacks Up Prices for the First Time in Years
item.description: Everything is getting more expensive.

item.title: Quel avenir pour Micromania-Zing en France ? L’enseigne discute avec un potentiel acquéreur
item.description: Un an après sa mise en vente officielle, l'enseigne Micromania-Zing est en discussion avec un acquéreur. La firme pourrait passer entre les mains d'un autre Américain.

item.title: ‘I want to cancel’: YouTube Premium quietly hikes its US prices for the first time in three years, forcing many users to consider the unthinkable
item.description: Google has aggravated YouTube Premium subscribers once again with an unexpected price hike.

item.title: RTX 5090s and other high-powered graphics cards may carry risks of cable melting issues — but Asus thinks it has solved this problem
item.description: Reports are still coming through about high-powered GPUs like the RTX 5090 having connector melting issues, but Asus has a solution.

item.title: Former Xbox exec thinks Naughty Dog's decision to cancel the 80% completed The Last of Us Online 'was the right call', but it shouldn't have greenlit it in the first place — 'The ambition was there, but the realistic upfront planning wasn't', she says
item.description: Former Microsoft Game Studios executive producer Laura Fryer thinks the decision to cancel The Last of Us Online was the right decision on Naughty Dog's part and greenlighting the project was the "real mistake".

item.title: ‘For All Mankind’ Just Had Its Biggest Moment Yet
item.description: io9 sat down with the showrunners of 'For All Mankind' to break down maybe its most consequential moment ever.

item.title: This Startup Wants You to Pay Up to Talk With AI Versions of Human Experts
item.description: Onix is launching a “Substack of bots,” where digital twins of health and wellness influencers dispense advice 24/7. And maybe hawk their products.

item.title: West Ham vs Wolves Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch West Ham vs Wolves live streams online and from anywhere, as two struggling Premier League sides go head-to-head at the London Stadium.

item.title: 240 millions d’euros débloqués : EDF propose de l’aide pour passer à l’électrique
item.description: La France produit de l’électricité jusqu’à 95 % décarbonée grâce au nucléaire et aux renouvelables. EDF entend ainsi accélérer l'électrification des usages afin d'en faire bénéficier le plus grand nombre. Dans ce cadre, des milliers de foyers bénéficieront d’une aide à l’achat de pompe à chaleur. En ferez-vous partie ?

item.title: Artemis 2 Is Coming in Hot Today—Here Are the 4 Critical Phases to Watch
item.description: Each step of the Orion spacecraft’s atmospheric reentry is essential to crew safety.

item.title: « Copilot est uniquement destiné au divertissement » : les conditions d’utilisation de l’IA font peur
item.description: En lisant les conditions d'utilisation de Copilot, on a l'impression que Microsoft ne croit pas vraiment en sa propre IA. Mais l'entreprise a une explication.

item.title: What splurging on $22 smoothies in this economy really represents
item.description: What explains the success of Erewhon’s $22 smoothie? Americans are skipping restaurant dinners, delaying car purchases, and scouring for grocery deals. Amid tariff anxiety and broader stress over affordability, consumer confidence has dropped to levels not seen in over a decade, according to The Conference Board, a business think tank. At this point, it’s wealthier consumers who are powering the bulk of spending in the U.S. economy....

item.title: Vidéoprojecteur TCL, écran QD‑OLED MSI et batterie Ugreen : les 3 meilleures promos tech du vendredi 10 avril 2026
item.description: En ce vendredi 10 avril 2026, les bons plans ne manquent pas du côté des marchands comme Amazon et Boulanger.

item.title: « Nous ne voulons pas de clones » : le designers de Stellantis veut différencier chaque voiture de chaque marque du groupe
item.description: Après un bref passage chez Renault, Gilles Vidal est revenu l'an dernier chez Stellantis en charge du design européen des voitures du groupe. Et ce dernier affiche une ambition claire : que les marques du groupe cessent de se cannibaliser.

item.title: Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they?
item.description: A warrantless wiretapping authority that has facilitated surveillance for decades is up for renewal in Congress. Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), last reauthorized in 2024, is set to expire on April 20th. A bipartisan coalition of progressive Democrats and members of the hard-right Freedom Caucus say it's long overdue for reform. […]...

item.title: Microsoft warns worrying security flaw exposed over 50 million Android users, says 'user credentials and financial data were exposed to risk'
item.description: An outdated SDK carries a dangerous flaw that allows threat actors to steal private data.

item.title: Meilleur smartphone Samsung Galaxy : pour quel modèle opter en 2026 ?
item.description: La firme coréenne propose l'une des gammes de smartphones les plus complètes sur le marché de la téléphonie. Quel est le téléphone Samsung qui est fait pour vous ? Vous trouverez ici les détails de leur catalogue et surtout nos conseils pour choisir le plus adapté.

item.title: Scientist Spots New Meteor Shower Linked to a Disintegrating Asteroid
item.description: Astronomer Patrick M. Shober found a new meteor shower—and it comes from an asteroid getting broken down by the Sun.

item.title: PC Industry in Dire Straits, ‘Asking You to Own Nothing and Be Happy,’ Says Framework CEO
item.description: At least one laptop maker is saying what PC owners have all been thinking.

item.title: Trader Joe’s is opening 18 new stores—here’s the full list of locations
item.description: The popular grocer is expanding across 12 states, with dozens of new shoppers about to get a store nearby. It’s about to get a bit easier to find a Trader Joe’s near you. The grocer just announced it will open 18 new stores across 12 states, including multiple locations in a handful of states, over the next several months.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 se dévoile : voici les premières images du design
item.description: Voici les premières images du Galaxy Z Flip 8, le prochain smartphone pliant à clapet de Samsung.

item.title: Bose’s rugged Soundlink Flex Bluetooth speaker is on sale for up to $50 off
item.description: We saw a host of excellent Bose discounts during Amazon’s so-called Big Spring Sale last month; however, none of them were quite as steep as the current price drop we’re seeing on the latest Bose Soundlink Flex. Right now, the portable speaker is on sale at Amazon in select colors starting at $109 ($50 off), […]

item.title: Trump Mobile isn’t giving up just yet
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. We're back to being ignored, but the company is showing signs of life. It's been nine months since Trump Mobile announced itself, seven months since the company updated any of […]

item.title: Meta Is Upgrading One of the Worst Parts of Its Smart Glasses
item.description: And no, it's not privacy.

item.title: Wit Studio Apologizes After Being Caught Using Generative AI Background Art Again
item.description: Following fan roastings for the AI-generated background art in its Crunchyroll fantasy anime, 'Ascendance of a Bookworm,' the studio promises to actually animate the sequence with human artists.

item.title: ‘Apple will grit its teeth and push through’ — new report suggests the iPhone Air 2 isn’t dead, and I sincerely hope it’s true
item.description: Apple will reportedly release the iPhone Air 2 ‘no matter how badly it sells,' and while I don't necessarily believe it, I hope it's true.
